title: Constrict
description: While the Slithering Strangler is alive, at the end of your turn, take [blue]1[/blue] damage.
smart_description: While the Slithering Strangler is alive, at the end of your turn, take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
notes: Removes itself when the Slithering Strangler dies. Damage dealt equals the stack count ({Amount}).
